# docker_system_prune (Action)

Remove unused Docker objects, similar to `docker system prune` (without interactive confirmation).

## Example Usage

```terraform
## The following code runs `docker system prune` when the trigger resource changes.

resource "terraform_data" "prune_trigger" {
  triggers_replace = [
    timestamp()
  ]

  lifecycle {
    action_trigger {
      events  = [after_update]
      actions = [action.docker_system_prune.cleanup]
    }
  }
}

action "docker_system_prune" "cleanup" {
  config {
    all     = true
    volumes = true
    filter = [
      "label!=terraform-manage",
    ]
  }
}
```

<!-- action schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `all` (Boolean) Remove all unused images, not just dangling ones.
- `filter` (List of String) Provide filter values in `key=value` format. Can be specified multiple times.
- `volumes` (Boolean) Prune anonymous volumes in addition to containers, networks, images, and build cache.
